description: Ruby script that directly calls ActionDispatch::Response#body from actionpack 7.0.0, triggering CVE-2022-23633 response body leak vulnerability.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.rb directly calls response.body on an ActionDispatch::Response instance

findings.human_justification: ActionDispatch::Response#body is called directly in app.rb, making the response body leak vulnerability exploitable.
